canonical_answer: A blue circular plastic board with a grid of holes sits on a grey textured surface. Dark glossy spherical marbles fill most holes on the board, with some resting on the outer rim. A human hand with dark skin tone enters from the top right to place and adjust the marbles into the empty indentations.

question: Describe the sequence of interactions between the hand and the game board throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a blue board with black marbles is shown; at 2s, a hand enters to interact with pieces; at 4s, the hand moves marbles near the center; at 8s, the scene becomes empty; at 16s, a hand returns holding a translucent blue marble.

question: Track the visibility of the game board and hand across the timeline.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the blue circular board sits on a grey surface; at 2s, a dark-skinned hand reaches into the frame; at 8s, the view clears completely leaving no objects; at 16s, the hand reappears manipulating a marble; at 18s, the scene becomes empty once more.
